nodes.description: Track BOM revisions per ECO; archive previous versions with full history

nodes.label: Threaded Replies
nodes.description: Reply in threads to keep conversations organized and in context

nodes.label: Rich Message Formats
nodes.description: Tables, checklists, cards, voice messages, and reactions in chat

nodes.label: Auto-Translation
nodes.description: Real-time message translation across languages for international teams

nodes.label: Smart Search
nodes.description: Full-text search across all conversations, files, and people in one place

nodes.label: Global Search
nodes.description: Search across people, messages, files, and records from a unified search bar

nodes.label: Bots & Integrations
nodes.description: App bots, interactive message cards, and third-party integrations in chat

nodes.label: App Bots
nodes.description: Connect internal and third-party bots to chat channels and DMs

nodes.label: Interactive Message Cards
nodes.description: Structured cards with buttons, forms, and dynamic data sent in chat

nodes.label: Collaborative Docs & Sheets
nodes.description: Real-time co-editing for documents, spreadsheets, and mind maps

nodes.label: Real-Time Co-Editing
nodes.description: Multiple users edit the same document simultaneously with presence indicators

nodes.label: Collaborative Spreadsheets
nodes.description: Shared spreadsheets with formulas, filters, and real-time sync

nodes.label: Mind Maps & Outlines
nodes.description: Mind-mapping and outline-style documents for visual note-taking

nodes.label: Inline Comments & Suggestions
nodes.description: Highlight any part of a document and leave contextual comments or suggest edits

nodes.label: Screen & Window Sharing
nodes.description: Share entire screen or specific windows during video calls

nodes.label: In-Call Doc Collaboration
nodes.description: Edit documents and whiteboards together during a live meeting

nodes.label: Live Auto-Translation
nodes.description: Real-time subtitles and translation for multilingual meeting participants

nodes.label: AI Meeting Minutes
nodes.description: Automatic transcription, speaker identification, and AI-generated summaries

nodes.label: Auto Transcription
nodes.description: Real-time meeting transcription with timestamped speaker identification

nodes.label: AI Summary & Action Items
nodes.description: AI extracts key decisions and action items from meeting transcripts

nodes.label: Searchable Transcripts
nodes.description: Full-text search across all meeting transcripts with timestamped playback

nodes.label: Email ↔ Chat Bridge
nodes.description: Convert emails into chat threads or share emails directly into channels

nodes.label: Custom Domain Email
nodes.description: Send and receive with your company domain from inside the platform

nodes.label: Wiki Spaces
nodes.description: Structured internal wiki with team spaces, hierarchy, and rich embeds

nodes.label: Wiki Spaces & Hierarchy
nodes.description: Organize articles into team, department, or project-level wiki spaces

nodes.label: Rich Embed Support
nodes.description: Embed live spreadsheets, charts, videos, and database records in wiki pages

nodes.label: No-Code Databases (Base)
nodes.description: Airtable-style databases with custom fields, multiple views, and automation

nodes.label: Custom Databases
nodes.description: Spreadsheet-like databases with custom fields, relations, and lookups

nodes.label: Multiple Views
nodes.description: Visualize data as table, Kanban, Gantt, calendar, or form

nodes.label: Data Collection Forms
nodes.description: Publish forms that write directly into database tables

nodes.label: Dashboards & Analytics
nodes.description: Build real-time dashboards from database tables without code

nodes.label: OKR
nodes.description: Company-wide goal alignment with Objectives and Key Results tracking

nodes.label: Goals & Objectives
nodes.description: Define and cascade OKRs from company level down to individuals

nodes.label: Company OKRs
nodes.description: Set organization-wide objectives visible to all employees

nodes.label: Team OKRs
nodes.description: Department and team-level objectives aligned to company goals

nodes.label: Individual OKRs
nodes.description: Personal objectives linked to team and company goals

nodes.label: Progress Tracking
nodes.description: Check-in cadence, progress updates, and alignment visualization

nodes.label: Progress Check-ins
nodes.description: Regular key result updates with trend charts and status indicators

nodes.label: Alignment Visualization
nodes.description: Tree view showing how individual goals connect to company objectives

nodes.label: AI Platform
nodes.description: Cross-module AI: semantic search, auto-translation, smart field extraction, and summarization

nodes.label: AI Search
nodes.description: Semantic search across all records, messages, documents, and files

nodes.label: Semantic Search
nodes.description: Find records by meaning, not just exact keywords

nodes.label: AI Translation
nodes.description: Auto-translate content across chat, documents, meetings, and the website

nodes.label: Chat Auto-Translation
nodes.description: Real-time translation of chat messages for international teams

nodes.label: Document Translation
nodes.description: One-click full translation of documents and website content

nodes.label: AI Smart Fields
nodes.description: Auto-populated fields that read and understand related text across records

nodes.label: AI Field Extraction
nodes.description: Auto-populate fields by reading emails, documents, and conversation context

nodes.label: AI Summarization
nodes.description: Summarize long threads, documents, and ticket histories on demand

nodes.label: Authentication
nodes.description: Identity and access management for all users and organisations

nodes.label: Login & Session
nodes.description: Email/password login, session management, remember-me, forced logout, concurrent session control

nodes.label: TOTP / Authenticator MFA
nodes.description: Time-based one-time password via Google Authenticator, Authy, or any TOTP app. Backup codes on setup

nodes.label: Passkeys (WebAuthn)
nodes.description: Phishing-resistant passwordless login via device biometrics or hardware security keys. FIDO2 standard

nodes.label: Enterprise SSO (SAML / OIDC)
nodes.description: Single sign-on integration with corporate identity providers: Google Workspace, Azure AD / Entra ID, Okta

nodes.label: Role-Based Access Control
nodes.description: Fine-grained permission system: roles, groups, module-level and record-level access rules per company

nodes.label: Auth Audit Log
nodes.description: Immutable log of all login attempts, MFA events, permission changes, and session activity per user

nodes.label: API Keys & OAuth Apps
nodes.description: Issue API keys for integrations; OAuth 2.0 app authorization for third-party access with scoped permissions

nodes.label: Documentation
nodes.description: In-product documentation hub — user guides, admin references, and API docs accessible inside the platform

nodes.label: User Guides
nodes.description: App

nodes.label: Searchable Articles
nodes.description: Full-text search across all guide articles with contextual suggestions based on current screen

nodes.label: Contextual Help Tooltip
nodes.description: In-app (?) icons on every field and section that surface the relevant guide article inline without leaving the page

nodes.label: Version-tracked Content
nodes.description: Documentation versioned alongside product releases; old versions accessible; auto-flag stale articles after deploy

nodes.label: API Reference
nodes.description: App

nodes.label: OpenAPI / REST Reference
nodes.description: Auto-generated API reference from OpenAPI spec; interactive try-it console for developers

nodes.label: Webhook Event Catalog
nodes.description: Documentation of all outbound webhook events with payload schemas and retry behavior

nodes.label: Release Notes
nodes.description: App

nodes.label: Changelog
nodes.description: Per-module changelog with links to relevant guide articles; in-app notification banner for breaking changes

nodes.label: e-Learning
nodes.description: In-platform learning management — structured courses, video lessons, quizzes, and certifications to onboard and upskill users on Indonesia System

nodes.label: Course Builder
nodes.description: App

nodes.label: Lesson Modules
nodes.description: Structured lessons combining text, images, embedded video (YouTube/Vimeo or self-hosted), and step-by-step walkthroughs

nodes.label: Quizzes & Knowledge Checks
nodes.description: Multiple-choice and scenario-based questions with configurable passing score; instant feedback with explanation

nodes.label: Bilingual Content (ID/EN)
nodes.description: Course content authored and delivered in both Bahasa Indonesia and English; user chooses language per session

nodes.label: Learning Paths
nodes.description: App

nodes.label: Role-based Learning Paths
nodes.description: Pre-built onboarding paths per job role (HR admin, Finance officer, Sales rep, etc.) with recommended course sequences

nodes.label: Progress Tracking
nodes.description: Per-user completion percentage, time spent, quiz scores, and streak tracking; manager dashboard for team progress

nodes.label: Certifications
nodes.description: App

nodes.label: Digital Certificates
nodes.description: Auto-issued PDF certificate with QR verification on course/path completion; shareable link with expiry date

nodes.label: Mandatory Training Tracking
nodes.description: Admin-assigned required training per role; compliance dashboard showing overdue employees; reminder notifications

nodes.label: Platform Core
nodes.description: Foundational primitives every module builds on: event bus, tool registry, audit log, schema extensibility, real-time layer, permission fabric, data lineage, and connector framework

nodes.label: Event Bus
nodes.description: Postgres outbox → NATS/Redis pub-sub; every event carries tenant_id, actor, type, payload, correlation_id, causation_id

nodes.label: Outbox Pattern
nodes.description: Transactional outbox ensuring zero event loss across module writes and external fan-out

nodes.label: Fan-out Workers
nodes.description: Async consumers: audit log writer, workflow trigger evaluator, real-time broadcaster, webhook dispatcher, AI agent notifier

nodes.label: Event Schema Registry
nodes.description: Typed event catalogue with versioning; validates payloads at publish time

nodes.label: Tool Registry
nodes.description: Named, typed, permission-checked actions (e.g. hr.employee.create) callable from UI, API, workflows, and AI agents uniformly

nodes.label: Tool Definitions
nodes.description: Machine-readable manifest of all available tools with input/output schemas and permission requirements

nodes.label: Tool Executor
nodes.description: Validates caller permissions, runs domain logic, emits domain event, returns typed result

nodes.label: Tool SDK
nodes.description: TypeScript helpers for modules to register tools with automatic Zod schema generation and permission binding

nodes.label: iPaaS — Legacy Integration
nodes.description: Integration layer for legacy enterprise systems: typed connectors, scheduled syncs, transformation pipelines, error retry, and observability. Pre-built connectors for SAP, Oracle EBS, Accurate, Jurnal, MYOB, and CSV/Excel ingestion

nodes.label: Connector Runtime
nodes.description: Sandboxed execution of connector tasks with credential vault, scheduling, and event-bus emission

nodes.label: Connector Library
nodes.description: Catalogue of pre-built connectors for common Indonesian and global enterprise systems

nodes.label: Field Mapper & Transformer
nodes.description: No-code field mapping and transformation rules between external schema and IS canonical models

nodes.label: Audit Log
nodes.description: Immutable, queryable record of every tool execution: actor (user/agent/service), intent, before/after diff, source (UI/API/workflow/agent)

nodes.label: Audit Writer
nodes.description: Event bus consumer that atomically writes every tool execution to the append-only audit table

nodes.label: Audit Query API
nodes.description: Filter by actor, resource, time range, action type; returns diffs; used by compliance and HR modules

nodes.label: Audit Log UI
nodes.description: Searchable, filterable audit trail view accessible to admin users and compliance officers

nodes.label: Schema Extensibility
nodes.description: Drizzle kernel columns + JSONB overlay for per-company custom fields; schema-driven form rendering from field definitions

nodes.label: Custom Fields
nodes.description: Per-company field definitions (text, number, date, select, relation) stored in schema registry; no DB migrations required at runtime

nodes.label: Schema-Driven Forms
nodes.description: Frontend renders forms dynamically from field definitions; validation rules colocated with schema

nodes.label: Custom Views
nodes.description: Per-company saved views (columns, filters, sort) for list and board layouts

nodes.label: Real-time Layer
nodes.description: WebSocket/SSE hub fanning domain events to connected clients; powers live dashboards, notifications, and collaborative editing

nodes.label: WS/SSE Hub
nodes.description: Hono WebSocket server; clients subscribe to tenant-scoped channels; events fan out from event bus consumer

nodes.label: Presence
nodes.description: Track which users are viewing which records; show collaborator avatars on records in real time

nodes.label: In-app Notifications
nodes.description: Push notification bell fed by real-time channel; unread count badge; mark-read API

nodes.label: Permission Fabric
nodes.description: RBAC + ABAC covering users, service accounts, workflow agents, AI agents, and integrations; record-level and field-level scopes

nodes.label: Non-human Subjects
nodes.description: Service accounts, workflow automation actors, AI agent identities — all first-class permission subjects with scoped tokens

nodes.label: Record-level Permissions
nodes.description: Row-level security enforced at the Tool Registry layer; consistent whether call comes from UI, API, or agent

nodes.label: Permission Audit
nodes.description: Every permission check decision logged with context; surfaces who-can-do-what reports for compliance officers

nodes.label: Data Lineage & Privacy
nodes.description: PII field metadata, consent capture, data retention policies, DSAR export — satisfies UU PDP No. 27/2022 requirements

nodes.label: PII Field Catalog
nodes.description: Mark schema fields as PII with data category (health, salary, identity); drives encryption, masking, and retention rules

nodes.label: Consent Capture
nodes.description: Timestamped consent records per data subject and processing purpose; consent withdrawal propagates to retention worker

nodes.label: Retention Worker
nodes.description: Scheduled job applies per-category retention policies; purges or pseudonymises expired PII records

nodes.label: DSAR Export
nodes.description: Data Subject Access Request handler: exports all personal data for a subject as structured JSON within 14-day SLA

nodes.label: Connector Framework
nodes.description: Pluggable adapters for external APIs (gov integrations, banks, payment gateways); each connector registers tools into the Tool Registry

nodes.label: Connector SDK
nodes.description: Base class for connectors: credential vault, retry with backoff, rate limiting, credential rotation, health check

nodes.label: Webhook Engine
nodes.description: Outbound webhooks: per-event subscriptions, HMAC signing, retry queue, delivery log

nodes.label: Job Queue
nodes.description: Durable background job queue (pg-boss or BullMQ) for async work: report generation, payroll run, bulk import

nodes.label: Tokenized Share Links
nodes.description: Any record can be shared via a signed, expiring URL — no login required. Customer views and e-signs a quotation, downloads their own e-Faktur, or approves a PO via a one-time link. Token encodes permissions, record reference, expiry, and optional OTP requirement

nodes.label: Token Generator
nodes.description: HMAC-signed tokens with configurable expiry, single-use flag, and scoped permission set (view, sign, pay, comment)

nodes.label: Share Access Log
nodes.description: Every external access via a share link is recorded in the audit log: who accessed (IP, device), when, what action was taken

nodes.label: External Embed Primitive
nodes.description: Sandboxed iframe embed for third-party widgets (Looker Studio dashboards, Google Sheets, Loom, weather, BPS data). Domain allowlist per workspace, strict CSP sandbox attributes

nodes.label: Mobile PWA
nodes.description: Progressive Web App layer for field and mobile access: offline-capable, push notifications, camera/GPS APIs; no native app store required

nodes.label: Mobile Shell
nodes.description: Responsive PWA shell with service worker, offline data sync, and install prompt

nodes.label: Offline Mode
nodes.description: IndexedDB cache of recent records; queue mutations when offline; sync on reconnect via event bus

nodes.label: Push Notifications
nodes.description: Web Push API; users opt-in per notification category; routes from real-time layer

nodes.label: Camera & GPS
nodes.description: Capture receipt photos, scan QR codes, geo-tag field activities; feeds expense, inventory, and attendance modules

nodes.label: Conversational
nodes.description: WhatsApp Business and chat-based access to IS: approve invoices, check leave balances, submit expenses via chat; powered by AI and Tool Registry

nodes.label: WhatsApp Integration
nodes.description: WhatsApp Business Cloud API; inbound message routing; outbound notifications for approvals and alerts

nodes.label: Approval via WhatsApp
nodes.description: Send approval requests (PO, leave, expense) as WhatsApp messages; reply Approve/Reject; routed through Tool Registry with full audit trail

nodes.label: Proactive Alerts
nodes.description: System notifications (invoice due, payroll processed, low stock) pushed to WhatsApp based on user preferences

nodes.label: Conversational Agent
nodes.description: Natural-language interface via WhatsApp or web chat; calls Tool Registry actions on behalf of users with full permission checks

nodes.label: NL Data Queries
nodes.description: Ask in Bahasa Indonesia ("Berapa sisa cuti saya?") or English; agent translates to Tool Registry read calls

nodes.label: NL Action Execution
nodes.description: Confirm-before-execute pattern: agent describes the action, user confirms, Tool Registry executes with full audit entry

nodes.label: Compliance Automation
nodes.description: Automated compliance workflows: UU PDP data handling, audit reports, regulatory deadline tracking, and policy enforcement rules

nodes.label: UU PDP Compliance
nodes.description: Automated UU PDP (No. 27/2022) compliance: DPO dashboard, breach detection (<14 day notification), consent audit, DSAR workflow

nodes.label: DPO Dashboard
nodes.description: Data Protection Officer view: PII exposure map, consent coverage, active DSARs, upcoming retention deadlines

nodes.label: Breach Detection
nodes.description: Anomaly detection on audit log (bulk exports, off-hours access, permission escalations); triggers incident workflow with 14-day notification SLA

nodes.label: Tax Compliance
nodes.description: Automated tax deadline calendar, e-Faktur filing status tracking, SPT preparation checklist, Pajakku/PajakExpress integration monitoring

nodes.label: Tax Calendar
nodes.description: Automatic deadline calendar from DJP schedule; alerts 7/3/1 days before; marks completion when filed via Pajakku

nodes.label: Compliance Report
nodes.description: One-click compliance posture: filed vs. due, open penalties, BPJS contribution status, e-Meterai usage vs. contract value

nodes.label: Marketplace
nodes.description: Plugin SDK and app marketplace: third-party developers build IS apps using the same Tool Registry, Event Bus, and schema primitives as first-party modules

nodes.label: Plugin SDK
nodes.description: npm package: register tools, subscribe to events, extend schemas, render UI slots — same APIs as first-party modules

nodes.label: Tool Registration
nodes.description: SDK method to publish named tools into the tenant Tool Registry with automatic permission scope generation

nodes.label: Event Subscription
nodes.description: SDK method to subscribe to domain events from any module; plugins receive events scoped to tenant

nodes.label: UI Slot Extensions
nodes.description: Plugins inject React components into named layout slots (sidebar, record-detail, dashboard widget) without forking core UI

nodes.label: App Store
nodes.description: Tenant-admin portal to browse, install, and manage third-party plugins; sandboxed execution; usage-based billing for paid plugins

nodes.label: Install & Sandbox
nodes.description: One-click install with permission review; plugins run in isolated worker context; can be disabled per-tenant without restart

nodes.label: Plugin Billing
nodes.description: Revenue share for plugin authors: usage metering via Tool Registry call counts; Xendit disbursements

nodes.label: Organization Structure
nodes.description: Multi-company and multi-branch hierarchy within a tenant: organizations, legal entities (companies), and branches/business units — the context every record and permission scope is anchored to

nodes.label: Org Hierarchy
nodes.description: organizations → companies → branches tables in tenant DB; one tenant can hold multiple legal entities (holding group use case)

nodes.label: Company Profile
nodes.description: Legal entity record: NPWP, NIB, legal name, address, default Chart of Accounts, default currency, e-Faktur NPWP binding

nodes.label: Branch / Business Unit
nodes.description: Physical location or cost center within a company: address, cost center code, default bank account — assigned to users and records

nodes.label: Request Context
nodes.description: Every Tool Registry call is stamped with company_id + branch_id from the caller context; Permission Fabric enforces cross-company isolation via ABAC; Event Bus envelope carries both IDs

nodes.label: Field Builder
nodes.description: LLM-powered field creation: describe a field in natural language, LLM outputs a typed field definition (key, type, validation, PII tag, mask), user confirms — no migration needed via JSONB overlay

nodes.label: Model Builder
nodes.description: Q&A wizard to define a new data model: what are you tracking, identifier, relations to existing models, lifecycle/status, approval requirement — generates Drizzle-compatible schema definition

nodes.label: App Builder
nodes.description: Build a complete app from intent: describe what you want, LLM scaffolds model + views + permissions + optional workflow; visual editor to refine the generated scaffold before publishing

nodes.label: AI Config Assistant
nodes.description: Natural language → structured config: NL to workflow draft (IS-STUDIO-AI-001) and NL to form/view schema (IS-STUDIO-AI-002); generates inspectable, editable artifacts not black-box execution

nodes.label: Industry Templates
nodes.description: Curated first-party industry packs: pre-built models, workflows, and views for vertical markets (healthcare, hospitality, education, construction, retail) — installable one-click per tenant

nodes.label: Healthcare Pack
nodes.description: Queue management system, BPJS Kesehatan claims workflow, clinical service codes (ICD-10), patient data PII handling, multi-poli scheduling

nodes.label: Hospitality Pack
nodes.description: Hotel property management: room inventory model, reservation lifecycle, F&B outlet integration, channel manager webhook receiver

nodes.label: Education Pack
nodes.description: Student records model, tuition billing with QRIS, academic calendar, teacher payroll supplement, BOS/Dana BOS budget tracking

nodes.label: Construction Pack
nodes.description: Project-based costing, RAB (Rencana Anggaran Biaya) model, equipment tracking, sub-contractor payment schedule, progress billing (termin)

nodes.label: Retail Pack
nodes.description: POS integration model, loyalty program, SKU-level promotions, omnichannel order routing, Shopee/Tokopedia connector via Marketplace SDK

nodes.label: Analytics Layer
nodes.description: One widget engine powering three surfaces: inline summary bar on every list view, per-module home canvas, and global home dashboard. All fed by Tool Registry aggregate tools and updated by Real-time Layer. No XML, no separate dashboard app.

nodes.label: Widget Runtime
nodes.description: Renders Apache ECharts widgets from JSON config; subscribes to Real-time Layer channels for live delta updates; Canvas rendering for 60fps with large datasets

nodes.label: Aggregate Tools API
nodes.description: Standard Tool Registry aggregate method pattern all modules implement: { tool, group_by, filter, metrics, limit } — type-safe, permission-scoped, same auth as UI read calls

nodes.label: Inline Summary Bar
nodes.description: Live stat bar at top of every list view; auto-computes totals, counts, averages from the current filter set; replaces the graph view mode-switch concept with always-visible insight

nodes.label: Module Home Canvas
nodes.description: Every module home is a react-grid-layout widget grid; IS ships strong per-module defaults; users add/remove/resize widgets; layout saved as JSONB — no separate Dashboard app needed

nodes.label: Global Home Dashboard
nodes.description: Personal cross-module canvas at the top level; users pick widgets from any installed module; role-based defaults (CEO view differs from HR Manager view)

nodes.label: Report Scheduler
nodes.description: Save any dashboard as a report; schedule delivery via Workflow Engine (cron trigger); export PDF/Excel via Job Queue; distribute to email list or IS Chat

nodes.label: Widget Composer
nodes.description: No-code drag-drop dashboard builder: query picker from aggregate tools, chart type selector (bar, line, pie, heatmap, gauge, table), color and axis config; generates the same JSON config the Widget Runtime uses

nodes.label: Cross-Module Report Builder
nodes.description: Combine aggregate tools from multiple modules into a single report canvas; used for management dashboards crossing HR, Finance, and Operations data; LLM can draft the layout from a natural language description

nodes.label: Asset Maintenance
nodes.description: Preventive and corrective maintenance lifecycle for physical assets. Receives hand-off from IS-FIN-AST on asset commissioning, generates scheduled work orders (calendar, usage-based, condition-based), tracks technician assignment, parts consumption, and feeds maintenance costs back to Accounting

nodes.label: Maintenance Schedules
nodes.description: Recurrence rules per asset: calendar interval (every 30 days), usage-based (every 5,000 km / 250 run-hours), seasonal. Auto-generates work orders ahead of due date

nodes.label: Work Orders
nodes.description: Corrective and preventive work orders: assignee (internal technician or external vendor), checklist steps, parts requested from Inventory, completion photo, downtime log

nodes.label: Maintenance Cost Tracking
nodes.description: Parts consumed deducted from Inventory, labor cost from internal HR or vendor PO; total cost posted to Accounting under the asset's cost center

nodes.label: Asset Maintenance History
nodes.description: Full timeline of all work orders per asset: what was done, by whom, parts used, cost, downtime. Linked to asset record in IS-FIN-AST

nodes.label: Portals
nodes.description: External-facing views for customers and vendors — no internal user license required. Customers download e-Faktur, view order status, accept quotations, and pay invoices. Vendors view POs, confirm delivery, and upload bills. Built on the same React app with a branded subdomain shell and external auth (magic link / OTP)

nodes.label: Customer Portal
nodes.description: Branded self-service portal per workspace (acme.is.id): invoice download (PDF + e-Faktur), order tracking, quotation acceptance + e-sign, online payment via QRIS/virtual account, support ticket submission

nodes.label: Vendor Portal
nodes.description: Vendors view their POs, confirm delivery schedules, upload bills for three-way match, and check payment status — eliminating 'kapan dibayar?' WhatsApp messages to Procurement teams

nodes.label: Employee Self-Service
nodes.description: Employees access payslips, leave balance, attendance records, expense status, and company announcements without an internal user seat. Ships as part of Mobile PWA (IS-MOB) in Phase 1; promoted to branded portal in Phase 2
